title: Hardcoded pricing data in component markup creates stale-data risk
reasoning: Pricing tiers ($150 per piece, $100/month, $3,500 book) are inlined as static object literals inside the JSX render function rather than extracted into a data module or CMS-driven source. Any price change requires a code change and deployment, and the risk of stale displayed pricing increases if the data is overlooked during updates.
recommendation: Extract pricing tiers into a separate data file or a headless CMS so content editors can update pricing without touching component code.
whyTestsDoNotAlreadyCoverThis: No tests are included for this page. The project has no test command configured.
